text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Off we go to Tokyo Racecourse! Got your lunches
packed with a carrot or two for snack time?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then time to head off to watch the Japanese
Derby, where the air's electric and the view never
disappoints!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right behind you, Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised you just want me to observe,
Trainer. I was sure you'd have me run in it...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Just wondering, but, um... why'd didn't you put
me in it?
choice_data_list: ...I had a bad feeling about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Kitasan Black was willing, of course I would've
considered having her run the Derby. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
2,400-meter long G1 races are unknown territory
for her, and the long straightaways at Tokyo
Racecourse really test runners' mettle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't imagine things going well. It was safer
to skip the race than to risk having her suffer an
overwhelming defeat and lose all confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for the race itself... It goes exactly as I
expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What speed! We haven't seen runners sprinting
this fast before! And now the front of the pack is
being disrupted! Breaking through the bunch is—

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Brusquement! Brusquement crosses the finish line!
No one was able to stop her! And she's set a
Derby record, folks! We've witnessed history!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: A Derby record... Wow... If I had been out there...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have been able to do a thing... There's
no way I could've kept up with that pace, no
matter how hard I tried to tough it out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it was just coincidence or fate, that
overwhelming victory leaves Kitasan Black
speechless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We return to my office and recap today's events.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... 2,400-meter races... Medium and
long-distance races are scary... The second you
run out of stamina, it's game over.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I can handle G1 races that are
2,400 meters or longer, just like the one today? I
really don't feel like I can...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No worries, Kitasan Black! There's nothing to fret
about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O, who has been listening to us
talk the whole time, inserts herself into the
conversation, full of confidence.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You've got the aptitude for both medium and
long races! There's no mistaking it, so don't you
worry!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: How can you be so sure I'll be okay, Bakushin O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! How could I not be? Just who do
you think your super special coach is, hm?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It is I, Sakura Bakushin O! The Umamusume who has been victorious in three 1,200-meter races—aka 3,600 meters total! That's super long distance!
choice_data_list:
So long distances... are just a couple of short
distances stacked together?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As far as I know, Sakura Bakushin O is a
specialized sprinter who has had many great
showings in G1 sprints.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, I've never heard anyone lump three
1,200-meter sprints into one long-distance
3,600-meter race... That's just not sound
reasoning.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If Bakushin O says I'll be okay, then I just might
be okay! Right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Uhh, I'm not really sure it's quite that simple...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gently try to stop Kitasan Black from taking
Sakura Bakushin O's word at face value, and take
a moment to think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Distance aptitude is a hard factor to pin down.
The only way to get a solid reading is to build up
experience in actual races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I was sure she could handle long
distances... But I can't say for certain at this point.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, if I'm not really cut out for long races...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Kikuka Sho might be even tougher.
That's 3,000 meters long. I'd better keep my nose
to the grindstone and train real hard!
